notes: Mines 8,593 PRs (7,191 agentic + 1,402 human) from the AIDev dataset plus GitHub-API mining; builds a custom AST-based Git-diff breaking-change detector (tool-build) and validates it via manual dual-annotator review of a 94-patch sample (Cohen's Kappa=0.79). Human annotation is author validation of tool output, not human-subjects research.
